scene_input.scene_summary: Zayd looks uncertain, weighing his options
scene_input.key_visual_action: Zayd looking down, biting his lip
scene_input.setting: A quiet room in the mosque

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 54

characters.name: Zayd
characters.appearance: tall, slender build, wearing a plain brown woolen cloak over a white thobe, a simple white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: Zayd sat in a quiet room in the mosque, weighing his options carefully. He looked uncertain, biting his lip as he thought about what to do.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A quiet, dimly lit room in a 7th century mosque with simple, unpainted mud-brick walls and a smooth stone floor. Late afternoon soft, warm sunlight streams through a small window high on the wall, casting gentle rays across the room. In the center of the room, a young man seen entirely from behind, medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a plain brown woolen cloak over a white thobe, a simple white cloth head covering, one hand extended down to his side, the other hand biting his lower lip in thought. Soft warm gentle light, contemplative and introspective mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Muted earth, beige, and soft gray palette with the brown woolen cloak as a color anchor. A small, low wooden table with a simple clay oil lamp in the corner, a few scattered parchments on the floor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'young man' -> 'young man seen entirely from behind'
